form.formComment: Third race start. Promising on debut 3rd of 7 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on November 21 over 1400m, slow going 1.3 len behind Honey Maker with 58kg at $3.70. form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming eased back early on 6th of 10 at Sandown-Hillside Mdn-Sw on March 11 over 1300m, 4 len behind Dirty Look carrying 57kg at $21. form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At debut, 5th of 7 at Cranbourne 3yo Mdn-Sw on February 13 over 1400m, 8 len behind Cinturato carrying 56kg at $19. Second-up 5th of 9 at Geelong 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1435m, 6 len behind Justique with 54kg at $15. Better again and this suits.
